name: lazyvim
description: Neovim distro - fast & full-featured LazyVim starter config
post_install: Write-Host '  🚀 Run nvim to start!' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '  📦 Plugins will auto-install on first launch' -ForegroundColor DarkGray

suggest.neovim: Required runtime - install with: sakura install neovim
suggest.ripgrep: Fuzzy finder dependency - install with: sakura install ripgrep
suggest.fd: Fast find alternative - install with: sakura install fd
